name: Cream of Veggie Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 cups Leftover veggies; broccoli, cauliflower, spinach, kale or cabbage
1/4 cup Grated cheese; Italian, Swiss, cheddar, etc.
recipeInstructions:
1. If you do not have enough vegetables, add mashed potatoes, rice or finely chopped sauteed celery or onion.
2. In a pot, melt the butter in the oil and sauté the onion until golden brown.
3. Stir in the flour. Lower the heat and gradually add the milk while whisking to avoid lumps.
4. Cook, stirring until bubbly. Add the broth and mix well.
5. Combine the leftovers with 2 cups of the cream sauce and puree in a blender, 2 cups at a time.
6. Return to pot and cook over medium heat for 3-4 minutes.
7. Add salt and pepper to taste. Heat until just below boiling point and stir in cheese until melted.
8. Serve hot with crusty croutons.
